text: Hi mister Jones.  Do you remember me from the last time you were here? How old are you now?
I'm fifty-two, doc. Remember me from before...
Any recent unusual symptoms or pain?

metadata.thought: User has provided their age, which is useful for context but not directly relevant to symptom elicitation. Next, I need to gather more specific symptom information.

text: My whole body aches; I feel really cold.
How long have you felt this way?
